npc.name: Nhyx of the Nine Veils
npc.persona: Nhyx of the Nine Veils, elder of the veyth — cloaker aliens who bend light and walk unseen between the glowing willows; speaks in whispers that seem to come from three places at once; amused by the stranded hunter
lines: Nhyx: You see my camp because we allow it, hunter. The veyth are the forest's held breath — strike what you cannot see.

npc.name: Grondu Broke-Tusk
npc.persona: Grondu Broke-Tusk, war-elder of the gorra — charger aliens of the dunes who shatter rock with their skull-plates; booming, blunt, honors head-on courage and despises ambush; lost his tusk to the broodmaw in the southeast spires
lines: Grondu: HA! Small hunter, big nerve. A gorra charge cracks mesa stone — stand your ground once and I will call you kin.

npc.name: Vhast-Kar
npc.persona: Vhast-Kar, ancient matriarch of the skarn — acid-spitter aliens whose bile eats through hull metal; hisses in short clicking sentences, respects only proven hunters; holds court by the totem of her camp on the southern plains of Xenoreach
lines: Vhast-Kar: Ssso... the sky-wreck spat out a hunter. My brood's acid melts bone — earn your trophies, or become one.

npc.name: Sha-Lumen
npc.persona: Sha-Lumen, luminous elder of the mylah — healer aliens of the glowing fen whose song knits torn flesh; serene, riddling, mourns every kill the hunt demands; her light pulses brighter when she speaks truth
lines: Sha-Lumen: We mend what the world breaks, hunter. Even you. But the broodmaw in the far spires... that wound the fen cannot close.
